scripts.build:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/middleware .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && mkdir -p .open-next/assets/.build && cp -r .open-next/.build/durable-objects .open-next/assets/.build/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js
scripts.preview:cf: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages dev .open-next/assets
scripts.deploy: npm run build:cf && wrangler pages deploy .open-next/assets
